description: Per-field validators — passing surface (§55). A compound <signup> cell with <name req length(>=2)>. Typing a valid "Ada" makes signup.name.isValid + signup.isValid true and clears the <errors of=@signup.name/> anchor (renders nothing).
rationale: §55 validators ride as bare attributes on the field decl; a valid value (req + length>=2) yields an empty errors list, isValid true, and an empty <errors> anchor. The validity surface is author-visible (impl-neutral) state.
